description: Dalian's traditional commercial center, featuring numerous shopping malls, restaurants, and metro transportation.
The core beach area of Golden Pebble Beach, with fine sand and clear seawater, ideal for seaside leisure.
A national first-class museum housing nearly 200,000 specimens, with extensive exhibits of marine life and dinosaur fossils.
The historical core area of Dalian, surrounded by numerous century-old European-style buildings, showcasing the city's historical evolution.
A seaside park with a beach, suitable for family outings and seaside relaxation.
The world's first museum themed around the mysteries of life, showcasing plastinated biological specimens.
A landmark square in the center of Dalian, featuring a crystal ball monument and a bustling commercial area.
Dalian's modern business district, equipped with musical fountains and a seaside promenade.
A wooden boardwalk built along the coastline, offering close-up views of the sea and waves, making it an excellent spot for strolling and sightseeing.
A street district preserving a complete collection of Russian-style architecture, offering a unique cultural experience.
